components.name: Button
components.descriptionZh: 按钮用于开始一个即时操作。
components.whenToUse: A button means an operation (or a series of operations). Clicking a button will trigger corresponding business logic.
components.whenToUseZh: 标记了一个（或封装一组）操作命令，响应用户点击行为，触发相应的业务逻辑。

props.name: block
props.description: Option to fit button width to its parent width

props.name: danger
props.description: Set the danger status of button

props.name: htmlType
props.description: Set the original html type of button

props.name: icon
props.description: Set the icon component of button

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Set the icon position of button

props.name: loading
props.description: Set the loading status of button

props.name: target
props.description: Same as target attribute of a, works when href is specified

props.name: variant
props.type: outlined | dashed | solid | filled | text | link

props.name: onClick
props.description: Set the handler to handle click event

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic Usage
demos.description: There are primary button, default button, dashed button, text button and link button in antd.

demos.name: size
demos.title: Size
demos.description: Ant Design supports a default button size as well as a large and small size. If a large or small button is desired, set the size property to either large or small respectively.

demos.name: loading
demos.title: Loading
demos.description: A loading indicator can be added to a button by setting the loading property on the Button.

tokens.name: contentFontSizeLG
tokens.description: Font size of large button content

tokens.name: contentFontSizeSM
tokens.description: Font size of small button content

faq.question: How to remove space between 2 chinese characters?

components.name: Table
components.description: A table displays rows of data.
components.whenToUse: To display a collection of structured data, or to sort, search, paginate, and filter data.
components.whenToUseZh: 当有大量结构化的数据需要展现时；当需要对数据进行排序、搜索、分页、自定义操作等复杂行为时。

props.name: bordered
props.description: Whether to show all table borders

props.name: dataSource
props.description: Data record array to be displayed

props.name: locale
props.description: The i18n text including filter, sort, empty text, etc

props.name: scroll
props.description: Whether the table can be scrollable

props.name: sticky
props.description: Set sticky header and scroll bar

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback executed when pagination, filters or sorter is changed

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic Usage
demos.description: Simple table with columns and data source.

faq.question: How to use virtual scroll?
faq.answer: Set virtual prop to true. Available since antd 5.9.0.

faq.question: How to fix column?
faq.answer: Use the fixed property in column config. Set scroll.x to enable horizontal scroll.

components.name: Select
components.description: Select component to select value from options.
components.whenToUse: A dropdown menu for displaying choices. Use when there are more than 5 options.
components.whenToUseZh: 弹出一个下拉菜单给用户选择操作，用于代替原生的选择器，或者需要一个更优雅的多选器时。

props.name: filterOption
props.description: If true, filter options by input

props.name: notFoundContent
props.description: Specify content to show when no result matches

props.name: popupMatchSelectWidth
props.description: Determine whether the popup menu and the select input are the same width

props.name: showSearch
props.description: Whether show search input in single mode

props.name: virtual
props.description: Disable virtual scroll when set to false

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when select an option or input value change

props.name: onSearch
props.description: Callback function that is fired when input changed

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic Usage

demos.name: search
demos.title: Select with search

faq.question: Why is the dropdown not showing search results?
faq.answer: Check if filterOption is set correctly. By default it filters by option label.

components.name: Input
components.description: A basic widget for getting the user input as a text field.
components.descriptionZh: 通过鼠标或键盘输入内容，是最基础的表单域的包装。
components.whenToUse: A user input in a form field is needed.
components.whenToUseZh: 需要用户输入表单域内容时。

props.name: addonAfter
props.description: The label text displayed after input field

props.name: addonBefore
props.description: The label text displayed before input field

props.name: allowClear
props.description: If allow to remove input content with clear icon

props.name: prefix
props.description: The prefix icon for the Input

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the input box

props.name: suffix
props.description: The suffix icon for the Input

props.name: type
props.description: The type of input, same as html input type

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic Usage

components.name: Form
components.description: High performance Form component with data scope management.
components.descriptionZh: 高性能表单控件，自带数据域管理。
components.whenToUse: When you need to create an instance or collect information. When you need to validate fields in certain rules.
components.whenToUseZh: 用于创建实体或收集信息。需要对输入的数据类型进行校验时。

props.name: colon
props.description: Configure the default value of colon for Form.Item

props.name: form
props.description: Form control instance created by Form.useForm()

props.name: initialValues
props.description: Set value by Form initialization or reset

props.name: onFinish
props.description: Trigger after submitting the form and verifying data successfully

props.name: onFinishFailed
props.description: Trigger after submitting the form and verifying data failed

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic Usage
demos.description: Basic Form data control. Including collection, verification, and submission.

components.name: Modal
components.whenToUse: When requiring users to interact with the application without jumping to a new page to interrupt their workflow.
components.whenToUseZh: 需要用户处理事务，又不希望跳转页面以致打断工作流程时。

props.name: closable
props.description: Whether a close button is visible on top right

props.name: confirmLoading
props.description: Whether to apply loading visual effect for OK button

props.name: maskClosable
props.description: Whether to close the modal dialog when the mask is clicked

props.name: okType
props.description: Button type of the OK button

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the modal dialog is visible or not

props.name: onCancel
props.description: Specify a function that will be called when the user clicks cancel button

props.name: onOk
props.description: Specify a function that will be called when the user clicks OK button

demos.name: basic
demos.title: Basic

props.name: vertical
props.description: Is direction of the flex vertical

props.name: wrap
props.description: Set whether the element is displayed in a single line or in multiple lines

props.name: justify
props.type: start | end | center | space-around | space-between | space-evenly

props.name: offset
props.description: Number of cells to offset from the left (Col)

changes.description: Fixed virtual scroll not working with expandable rows.
Added `variant` prop to set form components variant globally.
Fixed `centered` prop not working with custom footer.
Added `virtual` prop for virtual scroll support.
Added `color` prop for semantic button colors.
Added `variant` prop for button style variants.
Table supports virtual scroll via `virtual` prop.
Fixed Form.List `move` operation not triggering validation.
